query:
SELECT 
  u.id as gestor_id, 
  u.name as gestor_nome, 
  u.role,
  e.id as equipe_id, 
  e.nome as equipe_nome,
  (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(id) FROM users WHERE equipeId = e.id) as corretores_ids
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN equipes e ON e.gestorId = u.id
WHERE u.email = 'guilherme.97fn@gmail.com';
